title: Meaningful Variable Names for Decompiled Code: A Machine Translation Approach
authors: Alan Jaffe, Jeremy Lacomis, Edward J. Schwartz, Claire Le Goues, Bogdan Vasilescu
notes: Decompiler-specific identifier recovery; establishes lost names and placeholder-variable problem.

title: DIRE: A Neural Approach to Decompiled Identifier Naming
notes: Neural decompiled variable naming using lexical and structural information.

title: Augmenting Decompiler Output with Learned Variable Names and Types
notes: USENIX Security paper on DIRTY; predicts names and types in decompiler output.

title: Variable Name Recovery in Decompiled Binary Code using Constrained Masked Language Modeling
authors: Pratyay Banerjee, Kuntal Kumar Pal, Fish Wang, Chitta Baral
notes: VarBERT approach for raw decompiler output and masked language modeling.

title: STRIDE: Simple Type Recognition In Decompiled Executables
authors: Harrison Green, Edward J. Schwartz, Claire Le Goues, Bogdan Vasilescu
notes: Lightweight token-sequence method for decompiled names and types.

title: CodeSearchNet: Datasets, tools, and benchmarks for representation learning of code
notes: Semantic code search benchmark and function-level corpus.

title: CodeBERT: A Pre-Trained Model for Programming and Natural Languages
notes: Bimodal programming-language and natural-language representations for code search and documentation.

title: GraphCodeBERT: Pre-training Code Representations with Data Flow
notes: Uses data-flow structure for code representation and code search.

title: CodeT5: Identifier-aware Unified Pre-trained Encoder-Decoder Models for Code Understanding and Generation
authors: Yue Wang, Weishi Wang, Shafiq Joty, Steven C. H. Hoi
notes: Identifier-aware code model; useful contrast for low-signal identifiers.

title: UniXcoder: Unified Cross-Modal Pre-training for Code Representation
notes: Uses AST and comments to improve code fragment representation and code search.

title: Contrastive Code Representation Learning
notes: Learns functionality, not form, through semantics-preserving transforms.

title: code2vec: Learning Distributed Representations of Code
authors: Uri Alon, Meital Zilberstein, Omer Levy, Eran Yahav
notes: AST path-based code representation.

title: code2seq: Generating Sequences from Structured Representations of Code
authors: Uri Alon, Shaked Brody, Omer Levy, Eran Yahav
notes: AST path representation for summarization, documentation, and retrieval.

title: Semantic Search for Code
notes: Practical code-search tutorial recommending code and natural-language embeddings plus chunking.

title: Node Parsers / Text Splitters: CodeSplitter
notes: AST-node code splitting using tree-sitter.

title: Splitting recursively
notes: Fallback recursive splitter with configurable separators, size, and overlap.

title: What is hybrid search? How it works and when to use it
notes: Explains lexical plus semantic retrieval and fusion.

title: Hybrid Queries
notes: Documents dense+sparse hybrid retrieval and RRF/DBSF fusion.

title: AI-assisted Coding with Cody: Lessons from Context Retrieval and Evaluation for Code Recommendations
notes: Context retrieval and ranking for an AI coding assistant.

title: Securely indexing large codebases
notes: Describes syntactic chunks, asynchronous embeddings, and content-hash caching.

title: Precise Zero-Shot Dense Retrieval without Relevance Labels
authors: Luyu Gao, Xueguang Ma, Jimmy Lin, Jamie Callan
notes: HyDE method for query-to-document embedding alignment without labels.

title: Building RAG on codebases: Part 2
notes: Practical codebase RAG with LLM comments, hybrid search, HyDE, and reranking.
